summary: Backend waitlist API + landing page UI tested end-to-end. All backend tests pass (4/4). Frontend core flows (hero, FAQ, pricing cards, product demo steps, waitlist create + validation) work correctly. Found data-testid naming mismatches vs the review spec (nav-link-*, nav-cta-request-access, waitlist-team-size-*).

ui_bugs.issue: Nav link data-testids are 'nav-platform', 'nav-how-it-works', 'nav-architecture', 'nav-pricing', 'nav-faq' (prefix 'nav-') instead of spec-requested 'nav-link-*'. CTA testid is 'nav-cta' instead of 'nav-cta-request-access'. Links themselves work and scroll to sections when clicked in-app.
Chip testids are 'waitlist-team-{value}' (e.g. waitlist-team-1-10) instead of spec-requested 'waitlist-team-size-*'. Functionality works.

Interactive stepper works (all 7 demo-step-i buttons clickable) but there is no dedicated data-testid on the live/right-hand panel to programmatically assert content changes. Consider adding data-testid="demo-panel" for testability.

action_items: Optional: Rename Navbar data-testids to nav-link-platform / nav-link-how-it-works / nav-link-architecture / nav-link-pricing / nav-link-faq and nav CTA to nav-cta-request-access to match review spec.
Optional: Rename waitlist team size chip testids to waitlist-team-size-{value}.
Optional: Add data-testid="demo-panel" on ProductDemo live panel to allow tests to assert live content updates.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo and re-parses on GET — works, but consider storing as native BSON datetime.
No email format validation server-side; consider EmailStr from pydantic on WaitlistCreate.
No rate limiting on public POST /api/waitlist — spam risk for a marketing page.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (all functional flows pass; only naming mismatches vs spec)

seed_data_creation: Created a couple of TEST_-prefixed waitlist rows during backend and playwright tests; harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend /api/waitlist POST/GET verified. Frontend loads on https://legal-ops-ai-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Use domcontentloaded + timeout instead of networkidle (Lenis smooth-scroll keeps network/animation frames busy). All main sections have data-testids; only nav/team-size naming diverges from spec.
